title: Jerusalem
content:
I wept until my tears were dry
I prayed until the candles flickered
I knelt until the floor creaked
I asked about Mohammed and Christ
Oh Jerusalem

title: Verse
content:
1

Friends
The old word is dead.
The old books are dead.
Our speech with holes like worn-out shoes is dead.
Dead is the mind that led to defeat.

title: The Wrathful
content:
O pupils of Gaza...
Teach us...
A little of what you have
For we have forgotten...
Teach us...
To be men
For we have men...
dough they become..

title: We Are Accused Of Terrorism
content:
We are accused of terrorism
If we dare to write about the remains of a homeland
That is scattered in pieces and in decay
In decadence and disarray

title: A Letter From A Stupid Woman
content:

My dear Master,

title: Oh, My Love
content:
Oh, my love
If you were at the level of my madness,
You would cast away your jewelry,
Sell all your bracelets,
And sleep in my eyes.

title: My Lover Asks Me
content:
My lover asks me:
"What is the difference between me and the sky?"
The difference, my love,
Is that when you laugh,
I forget about the sky.

title: The Face Of Qana
content:
The face of Qana
Pale, like that of Jesus
and the sea breeze of April...
Rains of blood... and tears...

title: I Am With Terrorism
content:
We are accused of terrorism:
if we defended rose and woman
and the mighty verse...
and the blueness of sky...
A dominion... nothing left therein..

title: Light Is More Important Than The Lantern
content:
Light is more important than the lantern,
The poem more important than the notebook,
And the kiss more important than the lips.

title: The Epic of Sadness
content:

and I have been in need, for centuries
a woman to make me grieve

title: Every Time I Kiss You
content:
Every time I kiss you
After a long separation
I feel
I am putting a hurried love letter
In a red mailbox.
